Aeterna Noctis is a Metroidvania game, that has almost everything in it. Deep lore story, insane fights, banger music, hardcore platforming, just name it. Play as Noctis, the king of Darkness, and claim back your righteous throne!  Note that this review is based on the first playthrough on Hard difficulty.  [table] [tr] 	[th]Difficulty level[/th] 	[td]Aeterna(Normal), Noctis(Hard)[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Game length[/th] 	[td]30-50 Hours[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Game mode[/th] 	[td]None[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Endgame content[/th] 	[td]Free Roam[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Most discount at[/th] 	[td]60%[/td] [/tr] [/table]  [h1][u]Short Review[/u][/h1] [table] [tr] [th]Good stuff[/th] [th]Not so good stuff[/th] [/tr] [tr] [td] [list] [*] Price worth the hours.   [*] Lots, LOTS of things to do in the game. [*] All characters use VA.  [*] Well balance between platforming and combat.  [/list] [/td] [td] [list] [*] Bad map.  [*] Sometimes it felt too much.  [*] Bad menu UX.  [/list] [/td] [/tr] [/table]  [h1][u]In-depth Review[/u][/h1] [h1]Story[/h1] Tale as old as time, it’s a clash between Light and Darkness. And Chaos being the God of this world, they curse both Light and Darkness with immortality, fated to dance in eternity with the rights to rules as their prize. Noctis, the king of Darkness, after being ripped out of every power he has, needs to climb back, and face the Queen of Light, just like every repeated cycle before it. Is this cycle gonna be the same just like hundreds before it, or this gonna be the end of it?  The way the game told the story is beautiful. Complete with anime-esque cutscene and narrated by soothing voice, read out the tragic and poetic story that happened between the King and the Queen. Not only that, we can learn what happened in the past through NPC and monologue and such. Both the main story and side quest story equally interesting to made me want to keep playing just see what happen next.   [h1]Gameplay Mechanic[/h1] There’s a lot to unpack here, so I just point out the most notable one. Noctis have a skill tree that you can expand your EXP with to enhance your skills. The good thing is there’s 3 main paths of skills to choose from. The bad thing is you can’t acquire all the skills in the game. It designed that way because the level is capped and all the available skills points in the game is not enough to get all the skills. But the game allows you to reset your acquired skills point and re choose what you want.   The content of the game is MASSIVE. Noctis can acquire new weapons, new abilities, new charms, even new music! But it always comes with a catch. With a massive list of things to do, even the main story, the game doesn’t really have a clear navigation to help you to get to your goal. You need to pay attention to the very detail of the dialogue to get the idea where to go next. Speaking of paying attention, you need to remember the details of what you acquired, because you can’t see the details on the Menu loadout, it only shows the legend.  https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3001028922 A map is a MUST. Because the map doesn’t get revealed after you going through them and it is total darkness. Only by buying a map you can see the map. While it is cheap, it can get annoying if you pass the NPC that sells them and can’t find your way in the new area.  https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3001028805 Now to the main course, the combat. Noctis is versatile at combat, and so are the enemies. You can build your own playstyle by choosing which charm to use and which skills you level up. Whether you like melee or range, high risk high reward, or play safely. The enemies, both bosses and minions, are exceptionally creative and aggressive. All of them are challenging with their own unique taste and rewarding when you beat them.   The platforming, is on point. Not so tight, but not too easy either. My only complaint is there are some places that easy to get in, but very hard to get out, and you end up die in that closed space area and leaving your soul behind. But other than that, you get to experience a crazy kind of platforming challenge. The game even has a special dedicated challenge for platforming with time score globally to compete with other players.  [h1]Visual[/h1] The world in Aeterna Noctis has grown on me. I didn’t really like it at first, but after seeing a vast variety of the characters, especially each area with their own unique scenery and enemies, I love it. They have a subtle feeling when you are in it. From a dark grim place, into a colorful sky, even space! But then again, here comes my little complaint. Not only do they put beautiful background, but they also put something on the foreground too, that sometimes blocking the view. It only happened a few times, but still it gets annoying when you fall or get hit by something you can’t see.  https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3001028900 [h1]Audio[/h1] Not many times have I encountered a Metroidvania game with full dub. Even though they use VA, I don’t know which language they use. It not stopping there, the music especially the boss music, is a total banger. It’s a little bit of enjoyment whenever I need to redo the boss fight, which is nice. The SFX overall is also clean. This is something that sometimes goes under radar until it goes bad, so I appreciate they put thoughts into this too.   [h1]DLC[/h1] [list] [*]Aeterna Noctis Virtuoso (Coming soon as per writing of this review) [/list]  [h1]Final Verdict[/h1] [table] [tr] 	[th]Story[/th] 	[td]9/10[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Gameplay[/th] 	[td]9/10[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Visual[/th] 	[td]8/10[/td] [/tr] [tr] 	[th]Audio[/th] 	[td]8/10[/td] [/tr] [/table]  Final Score [b]8.5/10[/b]  While this game is almost perfect on paper, but I can’t help sometimes I felt the game is too much and end up tired after playing instead of satisfied. Nonetheless Aeterna Noctis is a super solid game in every aspect of it. The dev also announced 2 other new games that share the same Aeterna universe, and I will definitely be checking them out too! I have never played such games, I decided to try something in this genre, I accidentally saw this game in the recommendations. After watching the trailers, I was charged with a huge desire to play this game, against all expectations. Initially, to the extent of my stupidity, I did not understand anything😊. But after sitting and a little understanding began to reach what and how to do. The gameplay of the game seems to be very similar to all other metroidvanias, there are also some secrets, abilities, skills, character leveling and the like. The graphics did not disappoint from the word at all, very beautifully drawn, nice animations, effects and everything like that, in general, as for me, there is nothing to complain about. The audio environment is also excellent. As for the passage of the game itself, we can say that not everything is so simple, the developers have focused on ensuring that you are constantly able to think and do. Thoughtlessly here you won’t be able to pass almost 1 platform, and if you succeeded, then you are lucky 😊. It can also take a lot of nerves to pass, but interest in the game does not disappear, it’s hard enough to break away. In general, the game is very cool, interesting, difficult of course, but as you progress, you may even be able to relax, but this is not for sure😊. Definitely recommend, especially if you need to bring your head to work.

J'aurais aimé mettre une évaluation positive. J'ai essayé longtemps d'aimer Aeterna Noctis, qui semblait combiner deux de mes genres préférés, le metroidvania et le jeu de plate-forme de type SMB/Célèste. Et superficiellement, ça semble bien exécuté: la mécanique centrale - la flèche-téléportation - est intéressante et originale, le système de combat est excellent et les boss sont bien conçus.   Malheureusement, AN est un jeu avec des hauts très hauts et des bas très bas. Chacun décidera pour lui-même lequel sens l'emporte, je sais que pour certains c'est une expérience globablement très positive, je peux comprendre, mais en ce qui me concerne j'ai assez donné.  Il y a trois principaux problèmes.  Le premier, et le plus important, c'est le manque général d'inspiration. Beaucoup de remplissage sans intérêt. Le jeu est long, mais échoue à se renouveler suffisamment pour rester intéressant jusqu'au bout.  Mes vingt dernières heures de jeu ont été occupé à faire de la plateforme bien difficile, mais toujours la même, encore et encore, juste plus dur et plus long. C'est juste pénible, ça n'a aucun intérêt, je suis constamment en train de me dire "mais j'ai déjà fait ça, 5 fois". (Il y a juste une zone qui est bien). En plus de cela il y a du backtracking inutile qui oblige à refaire des sections de plateforme. 60% du contenu plateforme du jeu aurait pu être coupé.   Les deux dernières zones sont particulièrement mauvaises, non seulement parce qu'il n'y a aucune nouvelle mécanique, mais aussi parce que les devs ont juste placés des tonnes d'ennemis sans aucune réflexion et que traverser les zones est très pénible. Et finalement, le jeu contient certaines des quêtes secondaires les plus débiles que j'ai jamais vu. Je vais pas détailler pour pas spoil, mais franchement hésitez pas à aller voir des soluces, parce que c'est juste long et dénué de sens. C'est juste pour rajouter de la durée de vie.   Le second problème est l'aspect technique.  J'ai eu, en vrac: -Des temps de chargement infinis -Des commandes qui cessaient de répondre sans raison -Des zones qui devenaient inaccessibles sans crash -Des portes impossibles à ouvrir à cause d'interrupteurs non-fonctionnels -L'Âme (le truc qui reste à l'endroit de la mort à la Dark Souls) qui se place n'importe comment. -Baisse de fps parfois (vraiment génial quand ça arrive pendant une section de plateforme difficile)  Et ça, c'est juste les bugs. Il y a aussi les trucs qui sont simplement mal faits. Le jeu ne connait pas ses priorités et privilégie l'esthétique pure au détriment de l'expérience de jeu. C'est souvent illisibles  Enfin, le dernier problème, c'est que tout l'aspect metroidvania/exploration/worldbuilding est médiocre. Je vais pas trop détaillé parce qu'en soi j'aurais pu passer au-dessus, mais bon, vous attendez pas à qqch du niveau d'hollow knight, c'est bcp plus linéaire, les PNJ ont pas d'intéret, les zones sont bof (sauf une) bref on a le minimum syndical.   Voilà. Dommage donc. J'ai préféré Lone Fungus finalement, de loin.

[h1] Об игре и почему в неё стоит поиграть: [/h1] -Это отличная метроидвания, где каждый уровень плавно усложняется лвлдизайном и новыми способностями, и именно из-за плавности игрок, во-первых, привыкает и прогрессирует в своих навыках, а во-вторых, никогда не устает от платформинга. Хорошая ветка прокачки, чувствуется каждый вложенный поинт, интересная система улучшений гемами, от которых может получится совершенно разный по боевому геймплею билд. Уровни сделаны хорошо, даже присутствует нелинейность, которая иногда даже вредит, но в целом локации играются очень хорошо. Кроме того, что в игру приятно...играть, она так же и хорошо выглядит благодаря хорошему арт-дизайну. И, конечно, хочу похвалить хорошо раставленные чек поинты, перед каждым сложным платформингом стоит сохранение.  ps. В этой игре моё приключение скоро завершится, и я буду с нетерпением ждать следующей метроидвании от этой студии(НЕ РОГАЛИКА, К ЧЕРТУ ЭТОТ ЖАНР, ОН НЕ ПОДХОДИТ СЛОЖНЫМ ИГРАМ), надеюсь, что сиквел и следующий за ним проект, во-первых, будут только лучше, во-вторых, не будут стоить в пять раз больше положенного (на релизе aeterna noctis стоила в пять раз(!) дороже, и мнение разработчиков на этот счёт нельзя было назвать здоровым, благо, они одумались ). [b] Повторяю, если нравятся метроидвании и/или платформеры, обязательно поиграйте, вы не разочаруетесь. [/b]   pss. тут люди жалуются на сложность, но игра не настолько сложная, как они описывают, пару часов и вы точно пройдете сложный момент, тут нет длинных сложных забегов, как в I Wanna be или друкгих платформеров, которые созданы быть сложными, всегда игра дает перерыв, и, опять же, не перегружена тайм перфектом. Игра в меру и по честному сложная, то что надо для среднестатистического игрока.  Хочу сразу сказать о минусах(вдруг разработчик переведет и прочтет, и примет это на сиквел): -Управление стрелой, по диагонали её использовать невозможно, и пока разработчик не заставляет тебя решать прыжковые пазлы стреляя под таким углом - всё отлично, но как только ты собрался выстрелить ей под углом...это тратит не только снаряд, но и все твои нервы. -Кнопки движения не буффиризуются после атаки, от чего при быстром нажатии кнопок( А ты всегда это делаешь быстро в этой игре) ты делаешь рывок не в ту сторону, которую хотел. -цепляясь на стену нельзя совершать атаки вниз, я считаю это упущением геймдизайнера. -Невозможность получить особую ачивку за босса феникса и босса робота за одно прохождение, потому что они взаимоисключающие. -Перекрученная гамма убивает глаза, после огненного босса мне казалось, что я получил ожог роговицы. -Шакалит шрифты в мире и в меню. -Последнее обновление подключило изи античит, оно мне не особо мешает, это не та игра, в которой я бы хотел использовать спидхак, хотя некоторые пользователи им пользовались по состоянию здоровья, однако, само его присутствие в однопользовательской игре(хоть и с рейтинговыми минииграми), настораживает.

Ich liebe Metroidvanias, aber das hier ist eigentlich ein als Metroidvania getarntes Jump n Run. Die wiederum spiele ich auch verdammt gerne, deshalb hat das Spiel für mich gepasst. Empfehlen kann ich es deshalb aber bei weitem nicht für Jeden! Auch wenn ich recht viel Spaß hatte, das Game wirft einem ganz schön viel "BS" Stellen entgegen. Angefangen mit [spoiler] einem Pfeil, zu dem man sich teleportieren kann/muss. Damit konnte ich mich arrangieren, das hat ein Feeling vom 4ten Hokage aufgebracht :-) [/spoiler] Die Handhabung wird zum Glück auch wesentlich durch Upgrades vereinfacht, zum Beispiel [spoiler] dem dreifach Sprung oder der Zeitverlangsamung beim Abschuss. [/spoiler] Besonders viel geflucht habe ich aber [spoiler] auf runden Planeten, wo die Steuerung invertiert wurde, je nachdem an welcher Position der Planeten man sich befindet. [/spoiler] Im Endeffekt sind also nicht die Gegner, sondern meistens die Stages der schwere Part. Mir hat außerdem ein Equipmentsystem gefehlt. Wenn man damit leben kann ist es aber ein schönes, forderndes Spiel, nur eben nicht für reine Metroidvania-Fans.

This game tries so hard to be like hollow knight in some things, that they add mechanics or features that don't even match the game, for example, the intro of the game is interpreted in Spanish with their respective dubbing actress etc, everything is correct, but for for some damn reason the rest of the game, instead of for example, being in Spanish as the intro or silent with only text, it is in an indecipherable language, as if they were the hollow knight bugs, but done in a horrible way They are the worst dubbing performances I've seen not only in any game but in any movie, they're a disaster, they make you want to turn off the sound when they speak, also another thing about hollow knight that they shoehorned in, is that when you die you drop a soul, you have to go pick it up, but if you die somewhere else before picking it up, it's okay, you can die all you want and it's okay, there's no penalty, or at least as long as you're able to get it back somewhere At the moment, that useless mechanic is there simply because it worked in another game or because they felt like it, without even making any sense in this title. After 3-4 hours of play, the only challenge that this game presents to you are traps on the stage, as if it were a "super meat boy" or "i wanna be the guy" with very small platforms and the truth is that with an environment full of traps, you don't even want to explore, the bosses in this game are either creatures that throw a bunch of projectiles that you have to dodge constantly or an army of enemies that by themselves do nothing, but if you put 10 maybe they can kill you, it is very badly worked in that section, the level design also leaves a lot to be desired, you don't understand a ♥♥♥♥ where you have been or where you can go, it seems to me an insult to intelligence how the game is built in some parts, I do not recommend the game at all, I was literally playing it on hard and almost every time I died was from spikes or traps trying to explore areas etc.

PUBLICADA EL 1 JUNIO Como no se Reseñar juegos aca les dejo la receta de un bizcochuelo casero y esponjoso Ingredientes para cocinar un bizcochuelo casero (6 personas):  3 huevos  1 taza de aceite neutro  50ml de leche  1 taza de azúcar  2 tazas de harina 0000  1 cucharadita de polvo para hornear  ralladura de 1 limón o esencia de vainilla  azúcar glas  Paso a paso de la preparación: cómo cocinar bizcochuelo casero:  Batir el aceite neutro con el azúcar en un bol hasta que tome una consistencia blanda.  Añadir los 3 huevos. Mezclar muy bien hasta asegurarse de que quede bien incorporado.  Agregar la harina, leche y ralladura del limón/esencia de vainilla. Mezclar durante algunos minutos.  Tomar un molde, enmantecarlo y luego cubrirlo con un poco de harina. Esto es para que el bizcochuelo no se pegue.  Una vez que la mezcla quede homogénea, introducirla en el molde.  Prender el horno en una temperatura de 180º y poner el molde durante 45 minutos, aproximadamente.  Retirar el molde y esperar a que se enfríe durante varios minutos.  Una vez que el molde se termine de enfríar, retirar el bizcochuelo con cuidado.  Espolvorear con azúcar glas la superficie del bizcochuelo.  ¡Listo! Ya tenés un fabuloso bizcochuelo casero para comer en familia o con amigos.

Lets first this out of the way. It looks good and the environment are beautiful. Lots of secrets and a massive map.   But my god, the difficulty. MY GOD is it brutal. This is picking the "EASY" mode too and it's said "Oh it's for those who want to explore." Not in a million years. This mode is still 10 times harder than anything Hollow Knight could throw at you. There is nothing easy about it. You could say the main difficulty mode is akin to Hardcore level. Where as this easier mode is still on Very Hard.   This is just the bosses too that I've started to fight. They are ridiculous. You have no Invincibility Frames while dashing so you will get hit. Bosses attacks are often done in a way that unless you do a perfect jump you'll get hurt.  Even the normal enemies are going to be a challenge to deal with unless you're far higher level than them at which you'll be able to one shot them with charge attack.  Then come the jumping puzzles. Not lying when I say more and more of them demand almost near perfect execution of movement. This is with a teleport ability that is extremely fiddly to use and it has a delay after using it too. It is painful to try and complete them.  Not to talk about the "Planet" areas where controls can get inverted because you're walking on a round surface and you're supposed to make good platforming on that. I hate it. Also some planets on that part just kills you. It looks like the other planets but it kills you. No idea why. Maybe some SFX is broken.   There also isn't much you can do about the difficulty too. There are only so many secrets I can get before a certain boss fight to get extra health to make it a bit easier. What's bs about boss fights is that if you have extra potions and use them but then die. You're respawned before the boss fight if you want to take another go at it. But you don't get keep your potions. If you're just gonna respawn me before the boss again just let me keep my damn potions. Otherwise just respawn me back at the shrine because then I can at least farm monsters and have a chance to get potions.   So should you get it? Well there is an easy answer. Was Hollow Knight TOO EASY for you? Do you crave more difficult games? Then yes, this is for you.  Did you struggle with Hollow Knight but still finished it? Well this game will throw bosses that are on par with the last boss of the Hollow Knight DLC at you more than several times. I would not even try. The only reason I'm trying to complete it is because I paid for it.

Quick Score: 5/5  Notes: Gameplay is generally top notch, one of the best metroidvanias on steam. A relatively difficult game especially if going for achievements, would put it somewhere in the ballpark of hollowknight.   My only real complaints with the game are outside of the gameplay. I think the voice acting is terrible, the story is kind of hard to follow and feels pretty cheesy though that could be a translation issue, and some of the visuals feel extremely out of place and odd.   Game is a bit pricey but absolutely has enough content to justify it.

Ça me fait mal de le dire mais ce jeux , c'est un peut comme un plat 3 étoiles.  Le visuel est somptueux , l'univers cohérant et riche.  Les musiques sont envoutante et travaillé.  Le gameplay est précis , nerveux , agréable.   C'est un sans faute a tous les niveaux. Le jeu donne envie de s'y plonger , de découvrir ses secrets ....   Mais...  Oui parce qu'il y as un mais ...   Comme je le disait au début , c'est un plat 3 étoiles , mais gaché , parce que le chef a versé toute la salière dans son plat !  Car oui ! C'est beaucoup trop salé !!!!  Alors on goûte , on aprécie la recherche , le talent et l'association des divers ingredient , mais ce foutu sel vous empêche de profiter pleinement de l'aventure.   Je suis pourtant fan des plateformer " hardcore" , type , céleste , super meat boy etc , mais ici la sauce ne prend pas.  Pourtant cela avait bien débuté , j'ete même conquis par cet approche de gameplay !  Il faut être précis et tout dépend uniquement de votre skill.  Les chekpoint sont bien placé , on est pas obligé de se refarcir 5 minutes de jeux pour mourrir a nouveau comme un caca.  Non non même la c'est un sans faute.   Le gros problème c'est que cela brise le rythme !!! Et encore pire , certain passage sont un véritable cauchemars.  Je ne suis pas arrivé à la fin , ou certains critique la difficulté injuste , mais déja la... C'est de la souffrance gratuite.   Avec une difficulté moins elevé et des boss plus "simple" le jeux aurrai sincerement pu être elevé au rang de chef d'oeuvre !  Voir cela nous force à revenir sur le jeux , réessayer encore une 10ene de fois et abandonner de tristesse de ne pouvoir continuer l'aventure de manière agréable...   Je le dit avec beaucoup de tristesse mais..   Beaucoup trop de sel chef.... !!!

If you like Metroidvanias, you will definitely be absorbed by this game. It excels in (almost) every aspect. With an occasional grind, the better part of the game is a Hollow Knight - type beauty. Easy to get confused now and then in which direction to explore next (it's vast!). The map teleport system works from the very beginning as you explore. Yes, you do get a double jump at some point. When I've reached about 30 h of gameplay, my brain froze when I saw I was <50% into the story line. That was the moment I understood the complexity of the game, with it's HUUUUGE map full of well-inspired scenery and calming piano-organ soundtrack specific to each biome. From some point forward, the platforming gets FU***NG HARD. I don't remember the last time I've played a Metroidvania that requires so much concentration. It has the mechanics that make Dead Cells great, like the gap-step jump and action override but...the double jump that I was mentioning earlier?..even if you would have 10 jumps (and you don't), the game WILL punish you for being either prudent or fearful. Even the game tells you that if things get overwhelming, you should reduce the difficultly.... Just buckle up for the ride, it will be a long and rewarding one, well worth 20$ !

A mi parecer sus puntos débiles son un diseño de personajes, guion y diálogos algo pobre aunque lo suple con una banda sonora y escenarios de fondo espectaculares.  Quizás no comparta liga con los grandes del genero pero poco le falta. Ah!, y ademas está desarrollado por un estudio español!.

One of the best Metroidvania games I have played. Finished the game on Noctis mode with the (current?) max of 109% completion.  The controls are smooth and responsive. I never had any problems controlling the King of Darkness.  The weapons/skills are all fun to use and felt useful. I really loved the soundtrack.  The game features two difficulty modes: Aeterna and Noctis. I haven't played on the easier Aeterna Mode but you should probably play on that mode if the platforming is too much. The platforming on Noctis mode does get quite hard once you get one particular upgrade in the game but it was never frustrating to me.  The boss fights are very challenging but you have the ability to change your build by resetting the skill tree for no cost so if you are struggling just try a different build.  The game is also huge. At about 75% it started to drag a little bit mainly due to two rather difficult to traverse areas but I appreciated those afterwards because the platforming challenge was fun.  I had a blast with this game and fully recommend it! Looking forward to Aeterna Lucis!

Etwas gewöhnungsbedürftiges Metroidvania aufgrund der, selbst im einfacheren Aeterna-Modus, doch teils recht anspruchsvollen Platformingpassagen. Schöne Ideen für Levelarchitekturen, Stichwort Traumwelt   und Planetenlevel. Die Bosse sind recht knackig aber mit ein wenig Geduld und dem Lernen der Angriffsmuster durchaus machbar. Auch wenn bestimmte Upgrades einige Bossphasen deutlicher erleichtern können, also ruhig noch etwas erkunden wenn es mal irgendwo hängt bei einem Boss.  Zu kritisieren hätte ich die doch teilweise stark schwankende Framerate, welche die ohnehin schon kniffeligen Sprungpassagen manchmal durch Slowdowns etwas frustierend werden lässt. Auch viele Hintergründe die zwar schön gestaltet sind, bringen die Framerate durch ihre Unmenge an Partikel oder anderen Kleinigkeiten in den schwer erträglichen Bereich. (Reduzieren der Auflösung und Anpassung der Grafikqualität hilft manchmal es etwas zu besser. Manchmal aber auch nicht.)

The playthrough is fun but i would not recommend going for completion.

Unplayable /10  The control scheme in this game made it impossible for me to continue. When playing platformers, the standard layout is - you control movement with one hand, and jump, abilities, attacks with the other. However here you do everything with left hand, and only shoot with right, which is super overwhelming, and not clicking with me at all. There is no other solution for this, since the game is designed around it. (Yes, i have tried controller also, and it sucks as well.)  Other than that this game is really great metroidvania platformer, really pitty i could not enjoy it...

What is Aetrerna Noctis - it is a 2D platformer with soulslike and metroidvania vibes. It is about eternal fight of good (light) and bad (darkness) forces in some strange world. Some god cursed leaders of darkness and light and condemned them to fight each other for eternity. Every cycle one of them lose their powers and is sent back to the world of living to regain their might anew. This time it was a turn of a king of darkness (who you are going to take control of). The idea is that all of this already happened many times before.  This is a good well-written and made game which I would like to enjoy. I like the dark world and some of the NPCs (Although protagonist played on my nerves a bit). So why the negative review?   I can definitely recommend this game to hard-core action platformers fans. It will keep you on your toes and won't give you much time to catch breath between all the blades, disappearing platforms and other mumbo jumbo traps and tricky chain jumps. Sometimes you have to perform like a chain of 20 perfectly timed  jumps infused with dashes  (which sometimes have to be stopped in exact moment so you do not overjump the platform). You will fall to your death countless times just to start over. IT IS VERY CHALLENGING (especially the areas with leaderboards). Some of the steam achievements are like near to impossible or they make you to replay the game just for a one-time chance to receive the achievement or not (so if you like to platinium games be ready for near impossible experience for only best of the best). Sweat, blood and tears.  I was looking for soulslike/metroidvania game like Salt & Sanctuary with challanging combat and bosses but there is barely any of it in Aeterna Noctis. There is 90% platforming here and 10% souls game (maybe less). All the mobs are just damage sponges that serve as another trap/obstacle put between all the platforming challanges. There are no challanging mobs just for the fighting purpose. They are all very easy and unsatisfactory if faced on normal ground. Bosses also are not like in a souls game - they just require you to jump a lot and dodge projectiles etc. like in any other platformer.  That's why with heavy heart I gave up on this one and will not find out how the story is unrevealing and how it ends. I dont mind moderate platforming like in S&S but this I know it will boil my blood down the line so I prefer to save myself stress (and to play something else instead what I am going to enjoy for a change).

Steam me comenta que diga lo que me ha gustado de este juego. Creo que las 124 horas que llevo hablan por si mismas. En mi vida escojo pocos juegos a los que disfrutar al año porque muchas veces estoy ocupado y no puedo dedicarle todo el tiempo que me gustaría a jugar a videojuegos. Por lo tanto, todo el tiempo dedicado a Aeterna Noctis está bien dedicado. Hoy me he terminado el DLC puedo decir que este juego me ha hecho mejor jugador después de haberlo completado hace un año. Sigo entendiendo mejor los timmings y las tomas de decisiones de cuando saltar, cuando esperar y dónde cuadrar al personaje. No muchos juegos consiguen eso. Es difícil, por momentos incluso friustrante, pero es un juego muy satisfactorio también, y al igual que con otros juegos retadores, se premia el ser constante. No puedo más que agradecer al estudio de Aeternum Games por esta joya.

this game is the answer to the question "what if we create a whole game as hard as the white castle in hollow knight?"  + exceptional level design! every single puzzle is well thought of! and the idea that you can switch the difficulty and you get a new design is really convenient and seamless! + the controls are buttery smooth and responsive which makes the hard platforming digestible and doable. + fun combat options + big content and a lot of variety in the environment  +/- the story is fine, it has some great ideas but it isn't the reason to play the game +/- the music is good, I wish it was pushed more (I loved the dlc soundtrack!)  - the rewarding for some quests are really underwhelming and you feel you deserve way more for the hell you went through - the secondary weapons are not as useful as they could be, I think if they were 2-3 instead and incorporated in the skills they would have been more useful  - I wish the map was clearer, some tags get lost with the colors around it  all in all I'm the game surprised me , it is truly a hollow knight successor and a step in the right direction for metroidvania development

Aeterna Noctis es un metroidvania extremadamente genérico en sus mejores momentos. Los enemigos los has visto mil veces en juegos similares, las habilidades también, las mecánicas en su mayoría también. Y en nada de eso está a la altura de copiar bien aquello en lo que obviamente se ha "inspirado". Pero es peor cuando intenta innovar porque claramente los diseñadores no entienden las mecánicas, solo han oído que están de moda y listo. Especialmente visible esto es en el caso de la muerte, que como en los Souls, implica que dejas tus px en el lugar donde moriste; eso en un Souls funciona porque genera tensión ante la idea de perder todo lo conseguido, creando un pico de intensidad en la experiencia del jugador, pero aquí en vez de eso, tus px quedan tirados y tienes que ir a cogerlos y no se pierden, simplemente dejas de ganar px en el camino hasta que los recuperes. Así que pierdes la tensión y a cambio solo recibes el tedio de ir a recoger las cosas y perder px que no has ganado por el camino. Y luego hay otras cosas que funcionan mal. Los enemigos son extremadamente fáciles (el juego en general es fácil incluso en alta dificultad, con la excepción de algunas zonas de plataformas) y poco variados, el árbol de habilidades no funciona del todo bien y las habilidades desbloqueables carecen de interés más allá de alguna mejora pasiva genérica, las armas que puedes desbloquear tampoco aportan gran cosa en su mayoría, el mapa es un desastre como funciona... Suma a eso una trama sin chispa ni gracia, con un protagonista que va de Rey de la Oscuridad y parece un niño emo sin gracia, y hasta ahí llega lo que ofrece Aeterna en jugabilidad.  Gráficamente el juego es discreto, con un diseño de personajes y entornos visto un millón de veces, sin ápice de originalidad y con poco detalle. El sonido cumple, sin grandes maravillas, pero cumple. Y no me he encontrado con demasiados bugs jugando. Eso si, no está adaptado bien a teclado y ratón, haciendo que multitud de cosas que se hacen mejor con el ratón no se puedan hacer (como moverse por los menús) y que las teclas del teclado no se puedan reconfigurar porque, aunque técnicamente se puede, se resetean al momento a sus bindings originales.  El resultado es que, en sus mejores momentos, Aeterna Noctis es mediocre. Y en los peores es malo. Un 3,5.

While it's a noble attempt at a platforming soulslike, the pacing of the game doesn't allow for any breathing room. It's a nonstop bombardment of increasingly difficult platforming challenges. In the end it feels more like you're playing Super Meat Boy than Salt & Sanctuary.

Un gioco incredibile. Art design spettacolare e il level design è fuori da ogni logica. Enorme come poca roba in circolazione. Un livello di sfida che definire brutale è riduttivo,il gioco cmq ti mette a disposizione potenziamenti e albero delle abilità che aiutano a superare la titanica epopea. Il platform è il punto forte di questo titolo, tra salti doppi e tripli, mappe al contrario, gravità modificata e tantissime spine pronte a distruggere la speranza. E' davvero tanta roba da spaccare la testa. E' incredibile come questo titolo non sia entrato nell'olimpo del genere. Se vi è piaciuto Hollow Knight DOVETE dare per forza una chance a questo titolo. Preparate il calendario perché qui con la fantasia non si riescono nemmeno ad immaginare le bestemmie da tirare.
Really fun, difficult, but fair Metroidvania. 24 hours in and having an absolute blast.

Il y a des jeux comme ça ... on le lance et on est instantanément transporté.  Graphiquement, je le trouve superbe. Niveau ambiance, c'est top. Au premier coup d'épée, j'ai vraiment ressenti une grande satisfaction. La façon dont les coups sont portés et comment les mobs explosent, je trouve ça assez jouissif.  Concernant le level design, c'est somme toute assez linéaire, pas de zones entremêlées les unes aux autres. Mais ces zones sont immenses, je pense que les développeurs sont fou, il n'y a pas d'autre mot, quel boulot ! Et les dev ne se contentent pas de proposer des zones immenses, elles ont chacune leur spécificité, univers propres mais également mécanique propre. On sent une grosse créativité dans cette team. Alors, je mentirais si je disais que j'ai kiffé toutes les zones, non, il y en a bien 2 ou 3 que je trouve immonde niveau plaisir de jeu mais est-ce que l'on peut reprocher aux dev de proposer des choses nouvelles ? Non, bien sur et ça reste somme toute une expérience.  Niveau difficulté, je ne pense pas abuser en disant que c'est certainement le métroid like le plus dur auquel j'ai joué. Le plateforming est très très exigeant et l'expérience acquise sur d'autres jeux m'a été extrêmement utile. MAIS la où les devs sont malins, c'est qu'ils ont rendu le jeu difficile mais jamais frustrant. Ce qui fait qu'on ne se lasse pas d'essayer, d'essayer, mourir encore et encore mais à la fin ça passe. Comme dit plus haut, certaines zones changent un peu les règles (vous comprendrez que je ne veut pas spoiler) alors le plateforming devient tout simplement démoniaque. Niveau combat, c'est assez intuitif et on dispose d'assez d'outils pour spécialiser notre perso comme on le souhaite. On peut respé à volonté, ce qui est plutôt bien pour changer de stratégie face à un boss récalcitrant par ex. Le bestiaire est à l'image du jeu, gigantesque et les boss plutôt bien travaillés. Le boss de la forge est superbe !!! Il y a vraiment quelques mécaniques intéressantes et on sent encore et toujours la créativité de la team de dév. Je trouve cependant un peu dommage, l'utilisation à outrance de la téléportation concernant les boss de fin.  Un mot sur le dlc, Un dlc gratos, ça fait toujours plaisir. Par contre, le dlc d'un jeu dont la difficulté est titanesque, ne vous attendez pas à une partie de plaisir.  On pouvait espérer un boss rush, mais les devs ont pris le contre pied en introduisant des contres la montre et c'est somme toute assez sympa. A titre perso, je trouve la barrière du temps platine assez insane car ça nécessite de faire le parcours quasi-parfait. Et comme les devs ne reculent devant rien, ils ont même osé un ClM dans la pire zone, arff.  Bref, c'est un grand grand oui, si vous aimez ce genre de jeu, foncez, vous ne serez pas déçu !

There's so many metroidvania games nowadays that it's hard for one to stand out from the pack. A couple recent ones that didn't blow me away were 8 Doors and Ghost Song. They were ok, but there's 100 games just like them. Aeterna Noctis is something special. The maps huge, combat is tight, sense of exploration and discovery is there. Platforming feels good, no floaty feeling. You can tell there was a ton of care and love for the genre put into this game. This dev has joined my list of teams i'll always keep an eye on what they're doing next. They know what they're doing.  Update: Had a tech issue and the studio actually reached out and helped me figure it out. This team is awesome

ボリュームはホロウナイトの1.5倍ぐらい、体感的には1.8-2倍ぐらい。かなりシビアなプラットフォームアクションがメインで、二段ジャンプやらダッシュを駆使するだけならまだしも、矢先に自分をワープさせる矢を手に入れると、飛び交いならが針の穴を通す精密さが加わるので更に高難易度化していく。メトロイドヴァニア系の中ではトップクラスの難易度に。  ホロウナイトの白い宮殿、苦痛の道レベルのシビアなエリアがストーリー中盤辺りから既に出現し始めるので、人を選ぶのは分かる気がします。かなりのリトライ回数を積み重ねてしまうけど、随所にチェックポイントがあるし、決して無理なレベルではないので、この挑戦的な高難易度は、リプレイはしたくは無いが、面白かったと思います。  序盤は、薄暗い場所が続き、キャラの手前に更に背景を設置しがちなエリアが多いので、え？それ背景なのか、足場かの見間違いは多少ありました。中盤からは、割りと開けた場所が増えて来るので、見間違いは減ると思います。  [spoiler] 終盤の方の、北の界王様が住んでそうな、惑星が連なっているステージはかなり癖が強く、ステージの作りからして左右盲を誘発しがち。最後までステージを攻略しても尚、その操作性に慣れることがなかった、一番ゲロを吐きそうになるステージでした。[/spoiler]  一応最新のアップデートで、ジャンプ回数+1のアイテムが追加されたり、矢を撃ちやすくするガイドがデフォで付いたので多少は難易度が緩和されたかもしれません。

这是一个充斥着大量平台跳跃（俗称跳跳乐）的类恶魔城游。如果是同时喜欢跳跳乐和类恶魔城游戏的玩家我非常推荐这款游戏，绝对的量大管饱，让人大呼过瘾，反之如果是不喜欢在类恶魔城游戏里玩跳跳乐的玩家，那么这游戏的大体量和越来越难的跳跳乐只会成为一种折磨，完全体会不到其中乐趣。以下是我作为前者在全收集通关后给这个游戏作出的评价，仅供参考。  [h1] 跳跳乐 [/h1] 游戏的跳跳乐部分，我的评价是有难度但是设计优秀。我个人体感这游戏跳跳乐的难度上限超过空洞骑士的苦痛之路，介于蔚蓝的B面到C面，没有像蔚蓝C面那样需要零失误一次通过的超长版面跳跳乐。首先需要肯定的是游戏内有非常多的自动存档点（烛台），这意味着在跳跳乐死了之后可以马上从附近的烛台重开，没有无意义的跑图惩罚。获取能力扩大探索范围是类恶魔城游戏的经典设计，而在本游戏里，这些能力也较好的融入到跳跳乐的设计里。随着各种能力的获取，扒墙跳、二段跳、冲刺、黄箭（开机关）、蓝箭（传送）等等，跳跳乐的难度也在逐步升级，需要的操作也越来越多。传送箭是我觉得非常优秀且可以玩出花的设计，游戏里也确实围绕着传送箭做了很多东西，跳跳乐、解谜、战斗都有需要用到传送箭的地方，同时也可以作为快速跑图的一种手段。不同区域不同场景的跳跳乐也有着不同的特色和风格，我个人比较喜欢梦境王国和宇宙两个关卡，梦境王国通过射传送箭来判断虚实很有意思，而宇宙里穿梭各个星球的那场逃亡战非常惊艳。但我还是不得不吐槽下宇宙里几个重力环境下在星球内部绕圈的跳跳乐，我真的愿称其为终极折磨好吧，虽然设计的很有想法，但真的是反直觉的难。  推荐两个能大幅降低跳跳乐难度的蓝宝石。一个是眩跳，效果是增加一次跳跃，也就是可以实现三段跳，这个宝石我拿到后除了boss战基本是常驻的，部分跳跳乐必须三段跳，即使不需要，多一段跳跃在后期各种难度较高的跳跳乐里也能提供更多的操作空间。还有一个是时间蓝宝石，效果是射传送箭时（包括瞄准到箭射出后1秒左右）时间流速减半，不少跳跳乐需要在空中射出传送箭的瞬间做出跳跃或者冲刺的反应，这个宝石在这种情况能派上大用。还有个技巧也说下，跳跳乐跳到终点拿到收集品时，点菜单退出重进可以回到上个烛台，尤其是在收集碎片时这个方法非常好用，一般情况拿到碎片要带到一个安全的地方才算收集到，但是在拿到碎片的瞬间（即使人物处于滞空状态）打开菜单退出重进，也算收集完成，感觉算制作组的仁慈了。  [h1] 战斗 [/h1] 游戏的战斗部分，说实话，在我点出技能树中间最上面那个一次能回复两格生命值的技能后，我基本没怎么在战斗中受过苦。配合药水掉率变为3倍和缓慢自动回复血液的蓝宝石，道中的小怪真的是随便打，boss如果会招小怪，那基本等同于送血包。。。受伤会掉落血液，镰刀攻击也会掉落血液，血液集满一次就回两格生命值，黑暗之盾还可以免伤，另外还有个宝石效果是冲刺无敌（4秒cd），总之战斗的容错率是非常高的。我自认是比较手残的，但最终boss光明女王我也是一次性就莽过去了，完全没受苦。如果抛开这个bug一般的技能，或者是想打无伤boss成就的话，那我感觉是极难极难的，喜欢挑战的可以试试，有些boss技能只能靠传送箭才能躲掉。  [h1] 缺点 [/h1] 1.战斗中的光污染。游戏里部分场景背景以及很多小怪和boss的弹幕颜色亮度都偏高了（点名凤凰boss战），加上人物在整个画面里给我感觉是偏小的，这导致战斗过程中有时甚至看不清人物位置。  2.手柄按键设置不合理。一个2d横版动作游戏，并且有着相当多需要精确操作的平台跳跃的游戏，居然默认是用手柄摇杆来操控移动，而摇杆同时又负责射箭瞄准，别提多难受了。其实这个缺点可以去掉了，我今天试了下可以改成十字键，之前改键一直不成功，可能制作组更新过了，心疼用摇杆跳完全部跳跳乐的自己。。。  3.支线任务缺乏引导。很多支线过于谜语人，让我甚至连去哪个区域才能完成任务的大方向都没有，加之这游戏本身就比较冷门，网上很难找到攻略，使得完成全部支线任务更加困难。还有梦境王国里有四口钟那个房间，需要短时间内连续敲响四口钟才能打开左下的门，下面有个碎片，我一开始还以为是根据钟的音色高低来敲，好歹给点提示吧，真就一点提示没有。  4.地图整体设计不太行。这个游戏的地图确实是很大，但区域和区域的连接做的并不是很好，没有那种不同区域紧密联系，四通八达的感觉，比如海底要塞只能坐列车到达，其实就是块独立的区域，和其他区域没有任何接口。如果要把这游戏的整个地图放入一个矩形的话，那这个矩形会非常长，非常宽，但是大部分都是没有内容的黑色，有地图的部分会东一块西一块，很割裂。这使得打开地图选择传送点时经常要拉半天，制作组估计是考虑到这点才加上更直观的世界地图吧。

A good game, at first I didn’t understand how to play, but by the time you start pressing all the keys, you understand the essence, there is also an instruction, during the passage, a lot of cool things, the graphics are cool, and you can kill time in the game
